title: S3 SMP
description: The super scrotulious swag smp pack is a great well-rounded experience including proximity voice chat, a large selection of new blocks, and create for minor or major automation.
body:
The super scrotulious swag pack is a well-optimized roleplaying pack for me and my friends.

- Xali's Enchanted Books: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xalis-enchanted-books
- Cosmetic Armor: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked
- Quark Programmer Art: https://modrinth.com/mod/quark
- Aquamirae: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ob-aquamirae
